channel.title: xbyteid — Blog
channel.description: Articles about bug bounty hunting, Web3 security, smart contract auditing, and cybersecurity by xbyteid.

item.title: AI Agents in Cybersecurity: The 2026 Landscape
item.description: How AI agents are transforming bug bounty, recon automation, and vulnerability detection in 2026. Architecture patterns and real tooling.

item.title: Solana Token Extensions (Token-2022): Security Deep Dive
item.description: Comprehensive security analysis of Solana Token-2022 extensions, common vulnerabilities, callback reentrancy and secure patterns.

item.title: Building a Bug Bounty Automation Pipeline with AI
item.description: Practical 2026 guide to end-to-end bug bounty automation pipelines using AI agents: recon, discovery, triage and reporting.

item.title: Q2 2026 DeFi Exploits: $746M Dicuri, Worst Quarter Ever
item.description: Q2 2026 jadi quarter terburuk dalam sejarah DeFi — 70+ exploit, $746M dicuri. Analisis attack vectors dan pelajaran.

item.title: Airdrop Farming Guide 2026: Cara Dapetin $10K+ dari Multi-Wallet Strategy
item.description: Guide lengkap airdrop farming 2026 — setup multi-wallet anti-sybil, target airdrop terbaru, automation tips, dan common mistakes.

item.title: Bug Bounty untuk Pemula: Mulai dari Nol, Dapetin $1000 Pertama
item.description: Guide lengkap bug bounty untuk pemula Indonesia — tools, workflow, target selection, dan cara nulis report yang valid.

item.title: Smart Contract Security: Panduan Lengkap Audit Solidity untuk Pemula
item.description: Panduan lengkap smart contract security audit — common vulnerabilities, tools, dan cara mulai karir di Web3 security.
